description: Buffer overflow in igcore15d.dll 15.1.2.0 and 15.2.0.0 for AccuSoft ImageGear, as used in Corel Paint Shop Pro Photo 11.20 and possibly other products, allows user-assisted remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted .CLP file.  NOTE: some details were obtained from third party sources.
